description: Update/supersede: user first mentions one framework, then switches; eval checks latest state is recalled.

turns.content: I am using Vue.js for my personal project's frontend.
Vue is a clean and approachable framework. How's it going?
I actually switched to SvelteKit last week — much better developer experience.
SvelteKit is gaining a lot of traction. Good choice!
Yes, the compiled approach is much faster and the code is simpler.
The bundle size improvements are also notable.

eval_question: What frontend framework is the user currently using?
